examples: Unfortunately for Mr Sevier, the courts in Florida and Utah, found his legal arguments unpersuasive.
This article has employed an unconvincing argument in order to prove an unpersuasive point, which is not most appealing to the readers.
That the baby is too young to remember what happened is for many child-rights advocates an unpersuasive argument.
But his case does present a pretty poignant example of just how unpersuasive Intelligent Design has turned out to be.
